name: YouTube transcript with specific language flag
prompt: Extract the German transcript from this YouTube video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ — use --lang de
expected_behavior: Run ./scripts/youtube-transcript with --lang de and the video URL/ID
Script should request German subtitles (or fall back to auto-generated if none exist)
Output transcript content in readable format
success_criteria: Correctly passes --lang de flag to youtube-transcript script
Handles case where German subtitles don't exist (fallback to auto-generated or error message)
Does not silently default back to English when German was explicitly requested
edge_cases: No German subtitles available → script should try auto-generated captions as fallback, then report clearly if nothing found
Video has no subtitles at all → clear error message suggesting manual transcription or alternative source
Language code typo (e.g., 'ger' instead of 'de') → yt-dlp may fail; suggest correct ISO 639-1 codes
